description_long: This is a large, tracked military combat vehicle with a low, angular profile and a long, prominent cannon mounted on a rotating turret. The hull and turret are covered in thick, sloped armor plating, giving it a robust and defensive appearance. The vehicle features six large road wheels on each side, connected by continuous metal tracks for traversing rough terrain. The exterior is painted in a dark, matte green with subtle weathering and wear, suggesting extensive use. There are no visible markings or insignia, and the surface is free of additional external equipment or stowage. The overall design emphasizes protection, firepower, and mobility in urban or battlefield environments.
description: A heavily armored, tracked military vehicle with a long cannon and sloped green plating, designed for combat and mobility. Its robust, angular form and weathered finish highlight its tactical purpose.
description_view_0: Front view shows the sloped armor, narrow profile, and the tracks extending slightly beyond the hull.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the long cannon, six large road wheels, and the full length of the tracks.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the turret, rear armor, and the width of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the cannon, wheels, and track system in detail.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted centrally on the turret; no other visible weapon mounts.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the hull and turret; no visible modular or reactive panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid dark green paint with weathered patches and minor discoloration; no distinct camouflage pattern.
